_comment: Curated core/Std Lean premise atlas (no Mathlib). Each node maps keyword tokens to a high-value library lemma surfaced as a premise candidate (`by exact <sym>` / `by simp [<sym>]`). Wrong/absent names are harmless: the kernel rejects those candidates and only correct ones discharge. NOTE: module names MUST be unique per node — mathlib_atlas.py's PageRank diverges on duplicate modules. Built for the bare-Lean reachability fix; extend via build_mathlib_atlas.py when a Mathlib project is available.
